title: neolitsea glabra
intro: Neolitsea glabra, also known as the Chinese boxwood or Chinese box, is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Neolitsea glabra include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Neolitsea glabra can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
